combos.title: Combinations
combos.durationQuestion: Question: How long has it been since the first manned mission landed on the Moon?
combos.durationAnswerShort: Answer: The first manned Moon landing was { firstMoonLanding }. It is now { now }. Therefore, it has been { duration } since the first manned Moon landing.
combos.durationAnswer: Answer: The first manned Moon landing was { firstMoonLanding }. It is now { now }. Therefore, it has been { years } years, { months } months, { days } days, and { hours } hours since the first manned Moon landing.
combos.durationAnswer2: Answer: The first manned Moon landing was { firstMoonLanding }. It is now { now }. Therefore, it has been { fullDuration } since the first manned Moon landing.
